meta.title: Drillr - football training for your position
meta.description: A training app that knows your position. One plan, built around your level, your week, and the goals you actually care about.

hero.subtitle: Drillr is the football training app that actually knows your position. You get a plan shaped to your role, your level, and the time you've got.

usedBy.title: 12,400+ players train with us
usedBy.subtitle: From U13s to semi-pro, in 30+ countries, every single day.

steps.title: Pick your position
steps.body: Striker, winger, keeper, whatever you play, we shape the plan around what your role actually asks of you.

steps.title: Train every day
steps.body: Short, honest sessions. 15 minutes a day is enough to change how you play, and Drillr keeps count for you.

steps.title: Watch yourself grow
steps.body: Streaks, stats, little milestones. Once you start stringing days together, it gets hard to stop.

marquee.title: Whoever you are on the pitch, we've got you.

items.title: Drills chosen for your spot
items.body: Goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward. Every drill is picked for what your position actually demands.

items.title: A calendar that fits your week
items.body: Your training days, gym access, and experience level all go into the plan. It bends around your life, not the other way round.

items.title: Video demos for everything
items.body: Clear instructions, sets, reps, and a short video for every move. You'll never guess what something should look like.

items.title: Stretching that matches your game
items.body: Mobility work aimed at the muscles you actually use on the pitch, not a generic cooldown.

whyChoose.title: Why Drillr?
whyChoose.subtitle: A training app that gets how you play.

items.title: Tailored to your position
items.body: No generic workouts. Every session fits where you play and what your role asks of you.

items.title: Fits around real life
items.body: Train 3, 5, or 6 days a week. Miss a day and the plan shifts, no guilt trips.

items.title: Progress you can see
items.body: Streaks, a dominance rating, monthly reports. Your growth, in plain view, every week.

spotlight.title: Watch it climb.
spotlight.body: Your dominance rating moves up each week as you sharpen the skills that win matches at your position.

items.name: Alex M.
items.quote: Honestly didn't expect much, but after a month my coach said I was positioning way better. Stamina is crazy now too.

items.name: Sara K.
items.quote: My friend showed me the app and now I'm on it every day. Drills actually make sense for my position.

items.name: Daniel R.
items.quote: The position-specific stuff is what hooked me. Every drill feels like it's for my game.

items.name: Jakub W.
items.quote: Goalkeeper-specific work is rare in apps. Drillr nails it. My reactions and footwork are both up.

items.name: Maya L.
items.quote: I love the calendar - it adapts when I miss a day instead of guilt-tripping me.

items.name: Tomasz B.
items.quote: 30 minutes a day, 4 days a week, and I feel like a different player on Sundays.

positionPicker.title: What position do you play?
positionPicker.subtitle: Tap a position to see what Drillr does for it.

drillVideo.title: Real drills. Real demos.
drillVideo.body: Every exercise comes with a short, clear video. You'll know exactly what to do, how to do it, and what it should feel like.
drillVideo.caption: Agility ladder · Footwork drill

items.a: No. Drillr adapts to what you have. Tell us during onboarding whether you've got gym access, and we'll build your plan around it - barbell, dumbbells, machines, or just bodyweight.
Most sessions run 25-45 minutes. You can train 3, 5, or 6 days a week depending on the goal you pick during onboarding.
Yes. You can go through onboarding and try a sample of your plan for free. The full weekly plan and the rest of the drills are behind a subscription.
Drillr is built for ages 13 and up. Younger players should train under the eye of a coach or parent.

items.q: What if I play multiple positions?
items.a: Pick the one you play most often. You can switch positions any time in settings and your plan will rebuild around the new one.

items.q: Can I use Drillr alongside my coach's program?
items.a: Yes, loads of players do. Drillr is meant to sit next to team training, not replace it. Dial down your weekly volume if you start feeling cooked.

items.q: How do I cancel my subscription?
items.a: Cancel any time from your device's subscription settings, or through our Manage Subscription page if you signed up on the web.

coachesCta.title: Coaching a team or running an academy?
coachesCta.body: We're working on team plans, group dashboards, and academy partnerships. Drop us a line and we'll be in touch.

positions.indexSubtitle: Every Drillr plan is shaped around what your position actually demands.

goalkeeper.name: Goalkeeper
goalkeeper.description: Reflexes and positioning are what make great keepers. Drillr sharpens both with reaction work, lateral movement, and core stability - the stuff most apps skip.
goalkeeper.strengths: Drillr builds the explosive lateral mobility, reaction speed, and core stability that separate good keepers from great ones.
goalkeeper.weaknesses: Most keepers quietly skip lateral mobility and lower-body power. We won't let you.

defender.name: Defender
defender.description: Aerial wins, clean tackles, quick recovery runs - it all starts in the gym. Drillr builds the strength and stamina that carry 1v1s and clear lines.
defender.strengths: Aerial wins and tackling power start in the gym. Drillr trains both, plus the agility most defenders quietly skip.
defender.weaknesses: Defenders often skip agility - quick feet save goals too. We keep yours sharp.

midfielder.name: Midfielder
midfielder.description: Box-to-box asks for the full toolkit. Drillr builds the engine, the agility, and the mobility you need to run the middle from the first whistle to the last.
midfielder.strengths: Box-to-box asks for the full toolkit. Drillr gets you ready for the whole 90.
midfielder.weaknesses: Central midfielders who skip mobility pick up more late-game injuries. Drillr won't let that slide.

forward.name: Forward
forward.description: Explosive acceleration and sharp changes of direction are your edge. Drillr trains the pace, the power, and the agility that get you in behind, plus the strength to hold defenders off when you do.
forward.strengths: Explosive acceleration and sharp changes of direction are your edge. Drillr trains them every single week.
forward.weaknesses: Forwards who skip strength lose the touchline duels. We make sure you don't.

press.title: Press
press.subtitle: Get in touch with our team for media inquiries, interviews, and press releases.
press.subject: Subject
press.messagePlaceholder: Please provide details about your media inquiry, including deadline, outlet information, and any specific questions you'd like answered.

manageSubscription.title: Manage Subscription
manageSubscription.body: If you purchased your subscription on the App Store or Google Play, manage it from your device settings. For web subscriptions, enter your email below.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Drillr collects, uses, processes, shares, and protects your information when you use the Drillr mobile application, website, and related services. By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly (account details, training preferences, position, experience level, training goals), information collected automatically (device data, app usage, exercise completion), and information from third parties (Google, Apple, RevenueCat for subscriptions).

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use the information to deliver and personalize your training plan, calibrate exercises to your level, send notifications you opted into, process subscriptions, improve the Service, and respond to your support requests.

sections.heading: 3. Data Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell your personal information. We share data only with service providers strictly necessary to operate the Service (authentication, analytics, payments, push notifications).

sections.heading: 4. Children's Privacy
sections.body: The Service is not intended for users under 13. Users between 13 and 17 may use the Service with parental supervision and consent where required by law.

sections.heading: 5. Your Rights
sections.body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data at any time by emailing us. You may also adjust notification preferences and manage your account from within the app.

sections.heading: 6. Data Retention
sections.body: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. After deletion, residual backups may persist for a limited period before being permanently removed.

sections.heading: 7. Security
sections.body: We use administrative, technical, and physical safeguards to protect your data. However, no online system is entirely secure.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Updates become effective when posted. We may notify you by email or in-app for material changes.

sections.heading: 9. Contact
sections.body: If you have questions or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, contact us at drillrapps@gmail.com.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before accessing or using Drillr.

sections.heading: 1. Agreement to Terms
sections.body: Your access to and use of the Service is conditioned on your acceptance of and compliance with these Terms. By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

sections.heading: 2. Eligibility
sections.body: You must be at least 13 years old to use the Service. If you are between 13 and 17, you may only use the Service with the consent and supervision of a parent or legal guardian.

sections.heading: 3. Health and Safety Disclaimer
sections.body: Drillr is a training and education tool, not a substitute for professional coaching, medical advice, or physical therapy. Consult a qualified professional before starting any training program. Train within your limits and stop immediately if you feel pain or discomfort.

sections.heading: 4. Subscriptions and Payments
sections.body: Some features of Drillr require a paid subscription. Subscriptions are billed through the App Store, Google Play, or our web payment provider. You can manage and cancel subscriptions from your device settings or the Manage Subscription page.

sections.heading: 5. User Conduct
sections.body: You agree not to misuse the Service, attempt to gain unauthorized access, disrupt other users, or use the Service for any unlawful purpose.

sections.heading: 6. Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content within the Service - including drills, videos, copy, branding, and design - is owned by Drillr or its licensors and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without permission.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Drillr's total liability shall not exceed the greater of the amount you paid in the preceding 12 months or one hundred dollars (USD $100).

sections.heading: 8. Changes to These Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms at any time. Material changes will be announced through reasonable notice. Continued use after updates constitutes acceptance.

sections.heading: 9. Contact
sections.body: If you have questions about these Terms, contact us at drillrapps@gmail.com.
